transcript:
CALLER: Haan, namaste. Mujhe yeh jaanna tha ki kya aap log HDFC Ergo insurance accept karte ho?
AGENT: Haan ji, Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic mein HDFC Ergo ka cashless aur reimbursement dono accepted hai.
CALLER: Aur agar mujhe surgery karwani ho toh pre-authorization kitne din pehle lena padta hai?
AGENT: Planned surgeries ke liye ideally 3 to 5 working days pehle pre-authorization apply karna chahiye. Emergency cases mein hum same day bhi process karte hain. Aapko sirf apna TPA card aur doctor ka recommendation letter lana hoga.
CALLER: Aur kya maternity cover bhi hota hai HDFC Ergo mein?
AGENT: Yeh aapki specific policy pe depend karta hai. Generally HDFC Ergo ke kuch plans mein maternity after a waiting period covered hoti hai. Main suggest karunga aap apne insurer se confirm karein. Hamare TPA desk pe aap apna policy document lekar aa sakte hain, woh aapko guide karenge.
CALLER: Theek hai, bahut shukriya.
AGENT: Aapka swagat hai! Koi bhi sawaal ho toh call karein.
